title: AST SpaceMobile Stock Performance Analysis 2024-2026
text: ASTS reached its all-time low of $1.97 on April 2, 2024, but recovered significantly in 2025. In 2025, AST SpaceMobile's revenue was $70.92 million, an increase of 1505.21% compared to the previous year's $4.42 million. However, losses were $341.94 million, 13.9% more than in 2024. Despite these losses, the company experienced significant stock appreciation during 2025. In 2026, ASTS reached its all-time high of $129.89 on January 30, 2026, but has experienced volatility and disappointment. The stock is quoted at around $72.96 as of May 2026, showing mixed results with expectations high but earnings missing recently. Over the past year, ASTS has delivered a 178.080% change with a 52-week range between 22.470 and 129.890. The stock's performance reflects investor optimism about the company's partnerships and FCC approvals, offset by concerns about execution risks and cash burn.
